Manifest auto-download failed!
Error: Failed to download manifest metadata: Usage: dt <command> [flags]

A powerful cli tool for Intel developers

Flags:
  -h, --help     Show context-sensitive help.
      --debug    Enable debug logging

Commands:
  version                          Print dt version

  install                          Add dt directory to system PATH

  install-git-aliases              Install git-pr and git-refresh-proxy aliases
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  install-git-credential-helper    Install git-credential-dtkeyring credential
                                   helper
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  update                           Update dt binary to latest version
    [<version>]                    Optional version to upgrade to

  config
    get                            Print the value for a configuration key
      <key>
    get-config-dir                 Print the devtool configuration directory
    get-extensions-dir             Print the devtool extensions storage
                                   directory
    set-extensions-dir             Set the devtool extensions storage directory
      <dir>                        The value to set
    unset-extensions-dir           Remove custom setting for extensions storage
                                   directory
    get-extensions-binaries-dir    Print the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
    set-extensions-binaries-dir    Set the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
      <dir>                        The directory to install extension binaries
                                   into
    unset-extensions-binaries-dir
                                   Remove custom setting for extensions binaries
                                   directory
    dump                           Print the full configuration to STDOUT
    set-check-for-updates          Disable or enable check for new version of
                                   devtool
      enabled                      Set in devtool config to true
      disabled                     Set in devtool config to false

  diagnose                         Check workstation configuration for errors or
                                   missing packages

  refresh-proxy                    Update proxy settings

  proxy
    refresh                        Update proxy settings
    print                          Print proxy settings

  setup                            Setup your workstation
    install-git                    Install Git
    install-git-lfs                Install Git LFS
    install-docker                 Install and configure docker (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-certificates           Install Intel SSL certificates (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-choco                  Install the chocolatey package manager
                                   (Windows only)
    create-netrc-symlink           Create a symlink to the .netrc file in the
                                   user's home directory (Windows only)
    github-auth                    Create a new oauth token for Github

  branch                           Create a local branch for new development
    <branch-name>                  Name of branch to create
    [<start-point>]                Optional start point for new branch

  pr                               Manage Github pull requests
    init                           Create a local branch for new development
      <branch-name>                Name of branch to create
      [<start-point>]              Optional start point for new branch
    create                         Create pull request
    dump                           Print pull request details to stdout
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dump
    browse                         Open a browser to the given pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to open in browser
    download                       Download pull request
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to download
    close                          Close a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to close
    merge                          Merge a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to merge
      <sha>                        The head commit of the pull request branch
                                   you wish to merge
    enqueue                        Enqueue a Github pull request to a merge
                                   queue
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to enqueue
    dequeue                        Dequeue a Github pull request from a merge
                                   queue
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dequeue
    cherry-pick                    Cherry-pick all commits from the given pull
                                   request into the current branch
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to cherry-pick

  github                           Github helper commands
    print-token                    Get authentication token for the given GitHub
                                   repo URL
      [<url>]                      The url you need to access (default:
                                   https://github.com)
    revoke-token                   Revoke a token that was created by Devtool
      <token>                      The token to be revoked (OAuth or Personal
                                   Access Token)
    status-check                   Create status check in Github
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <sha>                        The commit id to update
    search-issues                  Search for open Github issues
    get-commit-status-check        Query a status check value by commit
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <sha>                        The commit to query
      <status-check>               The status check to query
    install-runner                 Install GitHub Runner on 1Source organization
    uninstall-runner               Uninstall GitHub Runner on 1Source
                                   organization
    encrypt-vault-secret           Encrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source
                                   inventory
    decrypt-vault-secret           Decrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source
                                   inventory
    service-runner                 Github service runner commands
      status                       Show status of Github service runner
      start                        Start Github service runner
      stop                         Stop Github service runner
    workflow                       Github workflow commands
      run                          Run a Github workflow
        <workflow>                 The name of the workflow to run

  extensions
    list                           List available devtool extensions
    enable                         Enable extension
      <name>
    disable                        Disable extension
      <name>
    update                         Update active extensions to latest versions
      [<name>]                     Name of extension to update
    install-aliases                Install suggested extension shortcuts
      <name>

  vault
    get-secret                     Fetch one or more secrets from a vault (for
                                   automation use)
      <secret-name> ...            One or more secrets to fetch
    verify-secret-password         Verify secret password from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to verify
    change-secret-password         Change secret password from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to change
    show-secret-info               Show secret info from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to change
    show-secret-password           Show secret password from a vault (for
                                   non-automation use)
      <secret-name>                Secret to change

Run "dt <command> --help" for more information on a command.

Please provide the manifest file path manually.
You can either:
1. Set GNAI_INPUT_MAN_PATH environment variable
2. Enter the path now
3. Exit

Enter choice (1/2/3):

14:10:21  ======================================================================
14:10:21  dt CLI found at: C:\Users\steveche\bin\dt.EXE
14:10:21  [Step 1/3] Fetching manifest metadata from QuickBuild...
14:10:21  dt CLI failed with exit code 80
14:10:21  stdout: Usage: dt <command> [flags]

A powerful cli tool for Intel developers

Flags:
  -h, --help     Show context-sensitive help.
      --debug    Enable debug logging

Commands:
  version                          Print dt version

  install                          Add dt directory to system PATH

  install-git-aliases              Install git-pr and git-refresh-proxy aliases
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  install-git-credential-helper    Install git-credential-dtkeyring credential
                                   helper
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  update                           Update dt binary to latest version
    [<version>]                    Optional version to upgrade to

  config
    get                            Print the value for a configuration key
      <key>
    get-config-dir                 Print the devtool configuration directory
    get-extensions-dir             Print the devtool extensions storage
                                   directory
    set-extensions-dir             Set the devtool extensions storage directory
      <dir>                        The value to set
    unset-extensions-dir           Remove custom setting for extensions storage
                                   directory
    get-extensions-binaries-dir    Print the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
    set-extensions-binaries-dir    Set the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
      <dir>                        The directory to install extension binaries
                                   into
    unset-extensions-binaries-dir
                                   Remove custom setting for extensions binaries
                                   directory
    dump                           Print the full configuration to STDOUT
    set-check-for-updates          Disable or enable check for new version of
                                   devtool
      enabled                      Set in devtool config to true
      disabled                     Set in devtool config to false

  diagnose                         Check workstation configuration for errors or
                                   missing packages

  refresh-proxy                    Update proxy settings

  proxy
    refresh                        Update proxy settings
    print                          Print proxy settings

  setup                            Setup your workstation
    install-git                    Install Git
    install-git-lfs                Install Git LFS
    install-docker                 Install and configure docker (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-certificates           Install Intel SSL certificates (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-choco                  Install the chocolatey package manager
                                   (Windows only)
    create-netrc-symlink           Create a symlink to the .netrc file in the
                                   user's home directory (Windows only)
    github-auth                    Create a new oauth token for Github

  branch                           Create a local branch for new development
    <branch-name>                  Name of branch to create
    [<start-point>]                Optional start point for new branch

  pr                               Manage Github pull requests
    init                           Create a local branch for new development
      <branch-name>                Name of branch to create
      [<start-point>]              Optional start point for new branch
    create                         Create pull request
    dump                           Print pull request details to stdout
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dump
    browse                         Open a browser to the given pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to open in browser
    download                       Download pull request
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to download
    close                          Close a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to close
    merge                          Merge a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to merge
      <sha>                        The head commit of the pull request branch
                                   you wish to merge
    enqueue                        Enqueue a Github pull request to a merge
                                   queue
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to enqueue
    dequeue                        Dequeue a Github pull request from a merge
                                   queue
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dequeue
    cherry-pick                    Cherry-pick all commits from the given pull
                                   request into the current branch
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to cherry-pick

  github                           Github helper commands
    print-token                    Get authentication token for the given GitHub
                                   repo URL
      [<url>]                      The url you need to access (default:
                                   https://github.com)
    revoke-token                   Revoke a token that was created by Devtool
      <token>                      The token to be revoked (OAuth or Personal
                                   Access Token)
    status-check                   Create status check in Github
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <sha>                        The commit id to update
    search-issues                  Search for open Github issues
    get-commit-status-check        Query a status check value by commit
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <sha>                        The commit to query
      <status-check>               The status check to query
    install-runner                 Install GitHub Runner on 1Source organization
    uninstall-runner               Uninstall GitHub Runner on 1Source
                                   organization
    encrypt-vault-secret           Encrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source
                                   inventory
    decrypt-vault-secret           Decrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source
                                   inventory
    service-runner                 Github service runner commands
      status                       Show status of Github service runner
      start                        Start Github service runner
      stop                         Stop Github service runner
    workflow                       Github workflow commands
      run                          Run a Github workflow
        <workflow>                 The name of the workflow to run

  extensions
    list                           List available devtool extensions
    enable                         Enable extension
      <name>
    disable                        Disable extension
      <name>
    update                         Update active extensions to latest versions
      [<name>]                     Name of extension to update
    install-aliases                Install suggested extension shortcuts
      <name>

  vault
    get-secret                     Fetch one or more secrets from a vault (for
                                   automation use)
      <secret-name> ...            One or more secrets to fetch
    verify-secret-password         Verify secret password from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to verify
    change-secret-password         Change secret password from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to change
    show-secret-info               Show secret info from a vault
      <secret-name>                Secret to change
    show-secret-password           Show secret password from a vault (for
                                   non-automation use)
      <secret-name>                Secret to change

Run "dt <command> --help" for more information on a command.
14:10:21  stderr: dt: error: unexpected argument asset
14:10:21  Auto-download failed: Failed to download manifest metadata: Usage: dt <command> [flags]

A powerful cli tool for Intel developers

Flags:
  -h, --help     Show context-sensitive help.
      --debug    Enable debug logging

Commands:
  version                          Print dt version

  install                          Add dt directory to system PATH

  install-git-aliases              Install git-pr and git-refresh-proxy aliases
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  install-git-credential-helper    Install git-credential-dtkeyring credential
                                   helper
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  update                           Update dt binary to latest version
    [<version>]                    Optional version to upgrade to

                                   directory
    set-extensions-dir             Set the devtool extensions storage directory
      <dir>                        The value to set
    unset-extensions-dir           Remove custom setting for extensions storage
                                   directory
    get-extensions-binaries-dir    Print the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
    set-extensions-binaries-dir    Set the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed

                                   into
    unset-extensions-binaries-dir

                                   directory
    dump                           Print the full configuration to STDOUT

                                   devtool
      enabled                      Set in devtool config to true
      disabled                     Set in devtool config to false

  diagnose                         Check workstation configuration for errors or
                                   missing packages

  refresh-proxy                    Update proxy settings

    [<start-point>]                Optional start point for new branch

  pr                               Manage Github pull requests
    init                           Create a local branch for new development
      <branch-name>                Name of branch to create
      [<start-point>]              Optional start point for new branch
    create                         Create pull request
    dump                           Print pull request details to stdout
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dump
    browse                         Open a browser to the given pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to open in browser
    download                       Download pull request
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to download
    close                          Close a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to close
    merge                          Merge a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to merge

                                   you wish to merge

      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format

14:13:34  ValueError: Manifest acquisition failed: Failed to download manifest metadata: Usage: dt <command> [flags]

A powerful cli tool for Intel developers

Flags:
  -h, --help     Show context-sensitive help.
      --debug    Enable debug logging

Commands:
  version                          Print dt version

  install                          Add dt directory to system PATH

  install-git-aliases              Install git-pr and git-refresh-proxy aliases
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  install-git-credential-helper    Install git-credential-dtkeyring credential
                                   helper
    [<install-path>]               Override the default install location (must
                                   be same folder where dt binary is installed)

  update                           Update dt binary to latest version
    [<version>]                    Optional version to upgrade to

  config
    get                            Print the value for a configuration key
      <key>
    get-config-dir                 Print the devtool configuration directory
    get-extensions-dir             Print the devtool extensions storage
                                   directory
    set-extensions-dir             Set the devtool extensions storage directory
      <dir>                        The value to set
    unset-extensions-dir           Remove custom setting for extensions storage
                                   directory
    get-extensions-binaries-dir    Print the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
    set-extensions-binaries-dir    Set the directory where extension binaries
                                   are installed
      <dir>                        The directory to install extension binaries
                                   into
    unset-extensions-binaries-dir
                                   Remove custom setting for extensions binaries
                                   directory
    dump                           Print the full configuration to STDOUT
    set-check-for-updates          Disable or enable check for new version of
                                   devtool
      enabled                      Set in devtool config to true
      disabled                     Set in devtool config to false

  diagnose                         Check workstation configuration for errors or
                                   missing packages

  refresh-proxy                    Update proxy settings

  proxy
    refresh                        Update proxy settings
    print                          Print proxy settings

  setup                            Setup your workstation
    install-git                    Install Git
    install-git-lfs                Install Git LFS
    install-docker                 Install and configure docker (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-certificates           Install Intel SSL certificates (Ubuntu Linux
                                   only)
    install-choco                  Install the chocolatey package manager
                                   (Windows only)
    create-netrc-symlink           Create a symlink to the .netrc file in the
                                   user's home directory (Windows only)
    github-auth                    Create a new oauth token for Github

  branch                           Create a local branch for new development
    <branch-name>                  Name of branch to create
    [<start-point>]                Optional start point for new branch

  pr                               Manage Github pull requests
    init                           Create a local branch for new development
      <branch-name>                Name of branch to create
      [<start-point>]              Optional start point for new branch
    create                         Create pull request
    dump                           Print pull request details to stdout
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dump
    browse                         Open a browser to the given pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to open in browser
    download                       Download pull request
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to download
    close                          Close a Github pull request
      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format
      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to close

help.\n      --debug    Enable debug logging\n\nCommands:\n  version                          Print dt version\n\n  install                          Add dt directory to system PATH\n\n                      directory\n    get-extensions-binaries-dir    Print the directory where extension binaries\n                                   are installed\n    set-extensions-binaries-dir         into\n    unset-extensions-binaries-dir\n                                   Remove custom setting for extensions binaries\n                                   directory\n    dump                         missing packages\n\n  refresh-proxy                    Update proxy settings\n\n  proxy\n    refresh                        Update proxy settings\n    print                          Create a local branch for new development\n    <branch-name>                  Name of branch to create\n    [<start-point>]                Optional start point for new branch\n\n  pr                               Manage Github pull requests\n    init                           Create a local branch for new development\n      <branch-name>                Name of branch to create\n      [<start-point>]              Optional start point for new branch\n    create                         Create pull request\n    dump                           Print pull request details to stdout\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dump\n    browse                         Open a browser to the given pull request\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to open in browser\n    download                       Download pull request\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to download\n    close                          Close a Github pull request\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to close\n    merge                          Merge a Github pull request\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to merge\n      <sha>                        The head commit of the pull request branch\n                                   you wish to merge\n    enqueue                        Enqueue a Github pull request to a merge\n                                   queue\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to enqueue\n    dequeue                        Dequeue a Github pull request from a merge\n                                   queue\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to dequeue\n    cherry-pick                    Cherry-pick all commits from the given pull\n                                   request into the current branch\n      <pr-number>                  Pull request number to cherry-pick\n\n  github                           Github helper commands\n    print-token                    Get authentication token for the given GitHub\n                                   repo URL\n      [<url>]                      The url you need to access (default:\n                                   https://github.com)\n    revoke-token                   Revoke a token that was created by Devtool\n      <token>                      The token to be revoked (OAuth or Personal\n                                   Access Token)\n    status-check                   Create status check in Github\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <sha>                        The commit id to update\n    search-issues                  Search for open Github issues\n    get-commit-status-check        Query a status check value by commit\n      <repo-path>                  Repository in OWNER/REPO format\n      <sha>                        The commit to query\n      <status-check>               The status check to query\n    install-runner                 Install GitHub Runner on 1Source organization\n    uninstall-runner               Uninstall GitHub Runner on 1Source\n                                   organization\n    encrypt-vault-secret           Encrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source\n                                   inventory\n    decrypt-vault-secret           Decrypt Secret using Vault from 1Source\n                                   inventory\n    service-runner                 Github service runner commands\n      status                       Show status of Github service runner\n      start                        Start Github service runner\n      stop                         Stop Github service runner\n    workflow                       Github workflow commands\n      run                          Run a Github workflow\n        <workflow>                 The name of the workflow to run\n\n  extensions\n    list                           List available devtool extensions\n    enable                         Enable extension\n      <name>\n    disable                        Disable extension\n      <name>\n    update                         Update active extensions to latest versions\n      [<name>]                     Name of extension to update\n    install-aliases                Install suggested extension shortcuts\n      <name>\n\n  vault\n    get-secret                     Fetch one or more secrets from a vault (for\n                                   automation use)\n      <secret-name> ...            One or more secrets to fetch\n    verify-secret-password         Verify secret password from a vault\n      <secret-name>                Secret to verify\n    change-secret-password         Change secret password from a vault\n      <secret-name>                Secret to change\n    show-secret-info               Show secret info from a vault\n      <secret-name>                Secret to change\n    show-secret-password           Show secret password from a vault (for\n                                   non-automation use)\n      <secret-name>                Secret to change\n\nRun \"dt <command> --help\" for more information on a command.", "type": "ValueError"}
exit status 1
2026-04-15 14:13:34 [DEBUG] steps:
- name: displaydebugger_agent
  type: agent
